body.purpose: Default UI copy and form text.

title.purpose: Expanded card headers and modal titles.

components.name: Home Card
components.description: Landing action tile — Room, Camera, or Screen.
components.css: .ds-home-card { background: #404249; color: #e8eaed; border: 1px solid #4a4d55; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px 20px 28px; min-height: 200px; text-align: center; } .ds-home-card__title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-home-card__icon { display: block; width: 80px; height: 80px; margin: 12px auto 0; opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Setting Panel
components.description: Device or option row inside expanded flows.
components.html: Video Source
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #313338; border: 1px solid #4a4d55; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; max-width: 480px; color: #e8eaed; } .ds-panel__title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-panel__row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-panel__select { flex: 1; min-width: 0; background: #383a40; color: #e8eaed; border: 1px solid #4a4d55; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; } .ds-panel__gear { width: 32px; height: 32px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #e8eaed; cursor: pointer; } .ds-panel__gear:hover { background: #383a40; }

components.name: Primary Start Button
components.description: START / go live actions in camera and screen flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: block; width: 100%; max-width: 480px; margin: 12px auto; padding: 16px 20px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #64c04d; color: #111; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #9ec7ee; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Footer Icon Button
components.css: .ds-footer-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: #a8b0bd; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-footer-btn:hover { background: #313338; color: #e8eaed; } .ds-footer-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6da5dd; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Loop Cam is a broadcast tool with a dark, quiet interface. Directors and performers complete camera, screen, and room tasks without marketing chrome. Layout tokens live in loop-ui.css; icons in loop-icons.css.
keyCharacteristics: Dark canvas with raised grey surfaces
Lucide via runtime upgrade on Line Awesome hooks
44px touch targets on footer and close controls

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Green is for go/live actions and active stream URLs only.

rules.name: The Flat Panel Rule
rules.body: Setting rows use one border and one background — no nested shadow cards.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadow appears only on floating toolbar and modals.

dos: Do use loop-ui.css and loop-icons.css tokens.
Do align gear, chevron, and select on one flex row.
Do use loopCamPermissionDeniedHtml for permission errors.
donts: Don't nest shadow cards inside expanded flows.
Don't use side-stripe accent borders on tips.
